name: Reflex Dog Treats - Mini Lasagna Sandwich with Cheese Biscuits 350g
shortDescription: Reflex Dog Treats – Mini Lasagna Sandwich with Cheese Biscuits are the perfect size dog biscuits for training and for rewarding good behaviour. Made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour.
description: Reflex Dog Treats - Mini Lasagna Sandwich with Cheese Biscuits are the perfect size dog biscuits for training and for rewarding good behaviour. Made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. INGREDIENTS: Cereals, Meat & Animal By-Products, Vegetable Oils & Fats, Glucose (5.4%), Milk & Milk By-Products, Minerals, Vegetables. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 10.4 Oil Content (%) - 7.2 Crude Ash (%) - 3.1 Crude Fiber (%) - 3.3 Sodium (%) - 0.7 FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Treats may be given as an additional snack. This product does not replace full-dog food daily. Recommended quantity: max. 10 pieces per day. Individual daily requirement depends on other factors, e.g. age, breed and activity. Keep in a dry, cool place.
